<<The Science of Forecasting>>

Ensemble modeling uses multiple simulations to predict weather. Each simulation has different initial conditions. This helps estimate probability of outcomes.

* * *

Models combine data assimilation to improve accuracy. Data assimilation blends observations with models. This creates a more realistic starting point.

* * *

Ensemble methods reduce uncertainty in hurricane forecasts. Probability distributions show possible paths. Data assimilation ensures models stay aligned with real-world data.

The role of ensemble modeling in improving the accuracy of weather forecasts.
